meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no testing knowledge (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no testing knowledge. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Solve Testing Gaps for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop shipping broken code. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate testing and deliver production-ready apps for your clients faster.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template bridges the testing gap by embedding automated unit and integration test scaffolds directly into your boilerplate. By pairing this with Claude Code, you transform your development workflow into an AI-driven cycle that writes, runs, and repairs tests automatically, ensuring every feature you ship is rock-solid.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and you’re staring at a codebase that works on your machine but lacks the structural integrity to survive production. For the modern freelancer, the absence of a rigorous testing strategy isn't just a technical oversight—it's a liability that leads to endless debugging sessions and eroded client trust. You don't need a PhD in QA; you need a system that enforces quality by design.

Antigravity changes the narrative. By standardizing your project scaffold with built-in testing patterns, you eliminate the cognitive load of 'deciding how to test.' When integrated with Claude Code, you move from manual verification to automated engineering, shipping high-velocity, bug-free applications that make you look like a senior architect, regardless of your current testing experience.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Set up the environment with pre-configured test runners and environment isolation to ensure consistency across all your freelance projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity base template with Jest and Supertest configurations enabled.

steps.title: Define Domain Models with Schema Tests
steps.description: Generate automated tests for your data models to ensure your API handles edge cases before you even write the business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a User model and corresponding unit tests for validation, edge cases, and type safety constraints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create a User model and generate a test suite covering all validation schema constraints.'

steps.title: Implement Test-Driven Feature Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write feature code that strictly adheres to the test requirements defined in the Antigravity template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the auth service logic to satisfy the existing test suite in the /tests folder.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the auth service and ensure all tests in /tests/auth.test.ts pass.'

steps.title: Automate Integration Testing
steps.description: Connect your API endpoints to the database layer with automated integration tests to catch dependency issues early.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an integration test script that validates the end-to-end flow of the order processing endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate integration tests for the /orders API endpoint using the provided test database.'

steps.title: CI/CD Pipeline Integration
steps.description: Configure the project to run your test suite automatically on every pull request, guaranteeing that no regressions reach the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow that runs the Antigravity test suite on every push to main.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create a .github/workflows/test.yml file to execute npm test on every push.'

pro_tips: Always use the '--watch' flag in Claude Code when iterating on tests to get instant feedback loops.
Treat your 'test/mocks' folder as a shared asset; copy it across projects to save hours of setup time.
Use Claude Code to 'explain' failing tests to you—it often identifies logic errors faster than debugging the stack trace.
Configure Antigravity to fail builds on coverage drops below 80% to maintain high quality for premium clients.
Leverage Claude Code's ability to refactor code specifically to improve testability, not just performance.
resources: Testing Best Practices for SaaS: https://testing-library.com/docs
content.next_steps: Once your first project is passing all tests, integrate a monitoring tool like Sentry to catch runtime errors in production that fall outside your unit test coverage.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with fragile code and start delivering professional-grade software that keeps clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
